title: The Prestige
tmdbOverview: A mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a life-long battle for supremacy -- full of obsession, deceit and jealousy with dangerous and deadly consequences.
synopsis: The Prestige is a 2006 drama, mystery and science fiction film from United Kingdom and United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.5 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
